benefits.description: Planning to use Retatrutide for weight loss (currently at 170 lbs, previously 130 lbs pre-long covid)
Hoping Retatrutide will help with inflammation leftover from long covid

protocol_notes: Post-long covid weight gain from 130 to 170 lbs. Previously tried HRT but it activated autoimmune illness. Researched HRT extensively over 2 years and saw 5 different gynecologists. Planning to start Retatrutide, concerned about cost compared to Mounjaro. Seeking advice on whether to use powder form and optimal titration schedule (debating starting dose of 0.5 vs 2.5 and whether to split weekly dose).
